  • archive — Dealing with mass storage systems »

DMF implementation of Archive¶

New in version 0.1.

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

class archive.dmf.DMF(Archive)¶

The DMF implement the abstract methods of the class archive.archive.Archive to handle a DMF file system. Whenever dm... commands are called for multiple files, a pipe is open between the current process and the dmget command to pass the list of files. This is more efficient. It is much safer not to pass any files which are not handled by DMF as some invalid results can sometimes be encountered (e.g. NASA).

do_stage(filelist):
Parameters:filelist (sequence) – list of files to stage

Calls the command dmget for each of the file specified.

offline(filelist):
Parameters:filelist (sequence) – a list of files in the archive

Calls the command dmattr -a state for each of the files and if the result is OFL, the file is kept in the list of files to stage. Returns the list of files found offline.

filesize(filelist):
Parameters:filelist (sequence) – a list of files in the archive

Calls the command dmattr -a size for each of the files and returns a list of sizes in bytes.

do_copy(filelist,destination):
Parameters:
  • filelist (sequence) – a list of files in the archive
  • destination (string) – path to the destination directory

Does nothing, files once put online are accessible from the DMF virtual file system.
